2604.13021.title: Representation geometry shapes task performance in vision-language modeling for CT enterography
2604.13021.paper_summary: Computed tomography (CT) enterography is a primary imaging modality for assessing inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), yet the representational choices that best support automated analysis of this modality are unknown. We present the first study of vision-language transfer learning on abdominal CT enterography and identify two main findings. First, mean pooling of slice embeddings gives better categorical disease assessment (59.2\% three-class accuracy), whereas attention pooling gives better cross-modal retrieval (0.235 text-to-image MRR). This pattern holds across all LoRA configurations tested and suggests that the two aggregators emphasize different properties of the learned representation. Second, per-slice tissue contrast matters more than broader spatial coverage: multi-window RGB encoding, which maps complementary Hounsfield Unit windows to RGB channels, outperforms all strategies that increase spatial coverage through multiplanar sampling, and in this setting adding coronal and sagittal views reduces classification performance. For report generation, fine-tuning without retrieval context yields within-1 severity accuracy at the prevalence-matched chance level (70.4\% vs.\ 71\% random), suggesting little learned ordering beyond the class distribution. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) improves this across all configurations, scoring 7--14 percentage points above the chance baseline and improving ordinal MAE from 0.98 to 0.80--0.89. A three-teacher pseudolabel framework enables all comparisons without expert annotations. Together, these findings provide the first baselines for this underexplored modality and offer practical guidance for building vision-language systems for volumetric medical imaging.
2604.13021.paper_summary_zh: 計算機斷層掃描（CT）腸道攝影是評估炎症性腸病（IBD）的主要影像學方式，但目前尚不清楚哪些表現選擇最能支持該方式的自動化分析。<lb/>我們提出了第一項關於腹部CT腸道攝影的視覺-語言轉移學習研究，並確定了兩個主要發現。<lb/>首先，切片嵌入的平均池化提供了更好的類別疾病評估（59.2\% 三類準確率），而注意力池化則在跨模態檢索中表現更佳（0.235 文本到圖像的平均檢索率）。<lb/>這一模式在所有測試的LoRA配置中均成立，並表明這兩種聚合器強調了學習表示的不同特性。<lb/>其次，每個切片的組織對比度比更廣泛的空間覆蓋更為重要：多窗口RGB編碼，將互補的Hounsfield單位窗口映射到RGB通道，超越了所有通過多平面採樣來增加空間覆蓋的策略，而在這種情況下，添加冠狀面和矢狀面的視圖會降低分類性能。<lb/>在報告生成方面，沒有檢索上下文的微調在與流行病學匹配的機率水平下達到1的嚴重性準確率（70.4\%對71\%隨機），這表明除了類別分佈之外，幾乎沒有學到的順序。<lb/>檢索增強生成（RAG）在所有配置中改善了這一點，得分比機率基準高出7至14個百分點，並將序數平均絕對誤差從0.98改善到0.80至0.89。<lb/>三教師偽標籤框架使所有比較在沒有專家註釋的情況下得以進行。<lb/>總體而言，這些發現為這一尚待探索的模態提供了首個基準，並為構建體積醫學影像的視覺-語言系統提供了實用指導。
2604.13021.author: Cristian Minoccheri et.al.
2604.13021.authors: Cristian Minoccheri, Emily Wittrup, Kayvan Najarian, Ryan Stidham
